data.raceComments: {"comment":"A Showcase Maiden Plate is run over 1400m for 50K, and 7. HEROES'N'VILLAINS has not been too bad in a couple of starts to date, finishing fifth at Wagga 2 weeks ago. He should be spot on third up, and he will have Braith Nock in the saddle this time. A good gate will help him, and he will go on top for us here. 9. MISS MAVERICK probably should have won a race by now, and she was runner-up in a similar field to this at Mudgee last week. If this race has not come too soon for her, then she should produce her usual honest effort. 1. LITLFELA has improved in each of her runs back from a spell, including a handy effort for fourth at Mudgee over 1200m 7 days ago. She has 1.5kg less to carry here, and with an extra 200m being ideal, she can figure in the top 3 this time. Include. 3. STRASSMAN has mixed his form since joining the Melissa Harrison stable, and the step up from 1000m to 1300m could be the key to his bouncing back into the money immediately. Stick with him.","runners":[7,9,1,3],"exclusive":true}
